files.notes: Failure/assistance events.
NIC structure + ownership.
Holding-company consolidated filings.
Branch locations.
1,733,881 rows for 1,901 non-deposit-trust-company entity-quarters absent from the Chicago Fed layer; surgically inserted by 07f_recover_gap_from_cdr.py (source_file cdrgap_*). Duplicate-free.
AFS/HTM fair value + AOCI + brokered (RC-B/RC/RC-E).

files.provider: FreeNIC derived FROM RAW (occ_historical_clv + luck_wide + sched_call; finhist-primary)
files.notes: CANONICAL clean from-raw bank panel: nominal+real $ levels (base 1990=100), per-bank, 3 strata. THE fix for robin_panel's uncalibrated absolute-$ columns -- use this for dollar LEVELS. Built by 45_build_clean_bank_panel.py (reuse of Bev Testing r2_build_clv_panel.py, sha d0fb7c8d). finhist historical-call v2.10.0 (2026-03-31), arXiv:2506.06082. Per-field DPR + NOT-CAPTURED register in clv_panel_v2.DPR.md. robin_panel is a derived ADD-ON, not the base.
PERMCO<->RSSD link.
Supervisory stress-test results.
Expanded MDRM crosswalk (code <-> concept / cross-source mappings). rows=2057; sha256=efd1174f0fe6c25f...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.
Official FFIEC edit/validation history for the dictionary's identities. rows=15622; sha256=c8378b136505db1a...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.
Dictionary version stamp and provenance keys (dictionary_version, repo, imported_by). rows=3; sha256=a87ed9410d50a144...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.

Empirically-adjudicated reconciliation registry (FFIEC official edits + official_calc derivations + curated identities) with per-row empirical_n / pass_rate / verdict against the warehouse. rows=7539; sha256=9002081b7e26b88f...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.

Per-schedule line-item map (FR Y-9C + Call), melted long; one row per (schedule, line, mdrm code). Source of the sched_* shaped views. rows=3198; sha256=ccc2d2151cfff1a9...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.

UBPR (Uniform Bank Performance Report) concept derivations; validated subset backs the ubpr_matrix view. rows=4099; sha256=6b68a8ba4418ca0f...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.

Coverage-audit map (built by 16_coverage_audit.py): every raw variable_id -> the shaped/raw views exposing it; the >=1-view reachability guarantee. rows=15435; sha256=8bb09c75aef7d9bc...; taxonomy companion https://andenick.github.io/bank-data-dictionary.
Union of public identity tables (234462 rssds).
Statistics on Depository Institutions.
Structure-change history.
Engineered SDI ratios + failure flags.
Branch-level deposits.

Per-filing ingestion-audit log (filing_type x period_end): source_file + entity_count + variable_count + ingestion_ts. Materialized during BHCF/call-report ingestion; internal provenance table, not source data.
Optional free key raises rate limits only.

Self-describing warehouse manifest: one row per table/view (purpose, grain, units, code_column, canonical-vs-derived, use_instead, row_count, period_span). Internal metadata derived from information_schema over the warehouse itself; not source data. Built/regenerated by 47_self_describing.py (CREATE OR REPLACE, idempotent).
HMDA mortgage-lending institution×year summary (NOT full LAR); adjacent dataset, by LEI.

Keystone identity join RSSD<->FDIC cert<->SEC CIK<->LEI + NIC reg IDs (103,037 rows, W18 upgrade): LEI/OCC/NCUA/thrift/CUSIP/ABA/tax/cert authoritative from nic_entity_identifiers (NIC); CIK from sec_cik_crosswalk via unambiguous name match; HMDA name-matched LEI kept only as fallback (lei_source flags origin). GLEIF bulk = optional future enrichment.

NIC entity attributes (rssd x dt_start/dt_end): holding-company indicators (bhc/fhc/slhc), broad/primary regulator codes, FRS/FHLB membership, SEC reporting status, bank count. The simplified 02_ingest_attributes.py load; widened by nic_attributes_ext + nic_entity_identifiers.
Entity master (NIC attributes).

384 entity-quarter cells genuinely absent from Fed-direct (pre-2001 below CDR's floor / post-2006 absent even from CDR). The 1,901-cell 2001-2006 trust-company cluster was recovered into call_report_filings from FFIEC CDR (Phase 7f) and dropped from Luck.
Variable dictionary.

Credit-union 5300 call reports — SCOPE EXPANSION beyond FDIC-insured; FS220 schedules melted to long. FULL history: 128 periods 1994Q1-2025Q4 = 1,180,127,335 rows / 13,535 credit unions / 19 schedules / 3,458 account codes. Ingested oldest->newest by 26_ingest_ncua.py across 3 zip-naming patterns (QCRYYYYMM / Call-Report-Data / call-report-data + special 5300Data0613Final=2013Q2).
Credit-union directory (cu_number x period_end): cu_name, charter_state, state, RSSD link. Companion to ncua_5300; built by 26_ingest_ncua.py. FULL history 1994Q1-2025Q4 (FOICU per quarter).

NIC attribute extension (220,092 rows, ~30 Fed-direct cols beyond the simplified 02 load): geography (street/zip/county/place/url), charter/regulatory codes (chtr/func_reg/prim_fed_reg/state_inc), status/type indicators, open/insur dates. Built by 37b_ingest_nic_attributes_ext.py.

Authoritative Fed multi-regulator ID crosswalk harvested from NIC attribute CSVs (102,932 rows): RSSD<->LEI/CUSIP/OCC/NCUA/OTS-thrift/ABA/FDIC-cert/tax. Widens the ~13-col 02_ingest_attributes load; built by 37_ingest_nic_identifiers.py.

Digitized from the primary OCC Annual Reports (occ.treas.gov). Harvard Dataverse DOI 10.7910/DVN/Q22XR1; also scorreia.com/data/call-reports.html. Kept (Option K) because it supplies +7149 banks and the 1905-1941 span unavailable elsewhere as machine-readable data. Cite Correia/Luck.

Standalone release of the FULL national-bank vintage (source=occ_historical_clv only), 7,986,823 rows / 79 years / 1863-1941, exported from the warehouse occ_historical table. Digitized from the primary OCC Annual Reports (occ.treas.gov). Harvard Dataverse DOI 10.7910/DVN/Q22XR1; license per Dataverse (citation required). Cite Correia/Luck. Companion file to occ_historical.parquet, which stacks BOTH the original 1867-1904 digitization (source=occ_historical) and this clv vintage.
ALL 8 US G-SIBs (JPM/BAC/C/WFC/MS + GS/BK/STT). GS 4Q2024 via Wayback/archive.org (goldmansachs.com is Akamai-gated); BK 3Q2025 + STT Q1-2025 direct. Agent/DARP table extraction.
Ownership hierarchy.
Reference taxonomy of Fed/FFIEC reporting-form codes (form_code -> form_name, filing_type). Lookup table.
Robin<->RSSD<->FDIC cert crosswalk.

Historical pre-failure deposit-dynamics / bank-run panel (78 vars: deposits/assets at suspension, collections, asset-quality buckets, deposit/asset growth booms-busts, run flags). Academic/derived; cite Failing Banks DB (QJE 2026, DOI 10.1093/qje/qjaf044).
Modern quarterly pre-failure deposit-dynamics panel (47 vars: time/demand/brokered/insured deposits, loan mix, NPL, YTD income/provisions, run flags). Academic/derived; cite Failing Banks DB.

Base table behind the guarded robin_panel view. CLV 'Failing Banks' verbatim import (combined_data.csv, ~2.87M bank-year rows / 156 vars); ingested by 28_ingest_robin_panel.py as robin_panel, then renamed to robin_panel_base by 48_footgun_guards.py (W4 dollar-column guard). Query through the robin_panel view; use clean_bank_panel for dollar LEVELS. Academic/derived; cite Failing Banks DB (QJE 2026, DOI 10.1093/qje/qjaf044).
Bank/BHC CIK<->name crosswalk from XBRL frames + submissions SIC filter; www.sec.gov Akamai-blocked so built via data.sec.gov.
CIK->SIC->sector.

Macro stress-scenario variable paths (real/nominal GDP, unemployment, CPI, Treasury/corporate/mortgage rates, equity/house/CRE price indices, VIX) with domestic/international scope; historical actuals + supervisory projections. Distinct from stress_scenarios_domestic/_international (the 2026 proposed-scenario split).
Proposed stress scenarios (domestic).
Proposed stress scenarios (international).
Predecessor/successor (mergers/charter changes).

Official FFIEC UBPR per-bank percentile RANK within peer group, long form (period x rssd x peer_group x UBPK concept). Four-Periods bulk per year (07i_acquire_ubpr_peer.py); 27 schedules melted + grain-deduped by 42_ingest_ubpr_peer.py. Scoped 2021-2024 to align 1:1 with the canonical ubpr_ratios panel (~250M rows, 5,073 banks, ~1,195 UBPK codes); full 25-yr history (~2.1B rows) is a documented resumable extension (07i rank <yrs> + 42 rank), deferred as disproportionate derived-magnitude data.

Official FFIEC UBPR peer-group percentile/statistic benchmarks, long form (period x peer_group x UBPS concept). Four-Periods XBRL/TSV bulk per year (07i_acquire_ubpr_peer.py); 27 tab-delimited schedules melted + grain-deduped by 42_ingest_ubpr_peer.py. 2002Q1-2026 (~22M rows, ~187 peer groups, ~1,259 UBPS codes).

FFIEC UBPR standardized analytical ratios, long form (rssd x period x UBPR concept). XBRL bulk per period (07g_acquire_ubpr.py; the CDR TSV format crashes headless Chromium so XBRL is used). FULL CDR extent: 94 periods 2002Q4-2026Q1 = 1,251,149,050 rows / 10,250 banks / 3,112 concepts (2002 Q1-Q3 not offered by CDR; 2002Q4 is the floor). Parsed by 39_ingest_ubpr.py.
Concept crosswalk (source_variable x source_table -> mdrm_variable + concept + match_confidence) built by 20_build_crosswalks.py; maps Luck / FDIC-SDI / DFAST variable names to MDRM.

FR Y-15 banking-organization systemic-risk / G-SIB indicators, long form (rssd x year x RISK line item). Annual NIC snapshot CSVs 2020-2024 (07h_acquire_y15.py: headed browser passes the Cloudflare gate to list the static-CSV URLs, which then download directly). 22,481 rows / 57 institutions / 184 line items. Parsed by 41_ingest_y15.py. NOTE: FR Y-9LP has NO bulk product (FFIEC distributes only Y-9C/BHCF in bulk; Y-9LP exists only as per-institution filings).

files.provider: FreeNIC derived (OCC Annual Reports + FDIC HSOB + Fed H.8 + member-bank tables, machine copies via FRED/FRASER)
files.notes: Replicated 163-year national/insured/commercial bank-aggregate spine: long form year x metric (num_banks / total_assets / total_deposits / total_loans) with a `definition` toggle (national_only / all_insured / all_commercial / member_banks), `source_series` provenance, and `junction_flag` regime-join markers (1896/1914/1934). 810 rows. License: Public domain (U.S. Government work). Validation r>=0.994 at junctions. Per-metric source chain in long_bank_aggregates_1863_2026_PROVENANCE.csv.
